title: Night-crawler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|nightcrawler}}
The '''night-crawler''' was a creature of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] legend. It was believed by the Wookiees that this creature lived at the [[Shadowlands/Legends|bottom of the deep forest]] and that it would drink the [[Blood/Legends|blood]] and spirit of its prey. It was said that those who had not honored their debts sank to the bottom and prowled there, ready and waiting to trap and kill anyone who came near them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''
